title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, it's time for the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is worried whether she can inspire
people to dream in the same way she herself was
inspired in the past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when she watches the live broadcast
from the racecourse and sees the fans cheering
for her, her fears melt away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ready to answer their expectations, she steps out
into the race she's always dreamed of.
